title: Crucified Lilith
wikitext:
[]: Crucified Lilith             Quote Post by Nei » Sat Sep 21, 2019 5:59 pm Is there anything that explains how Lilith was crucified? How a powerful being was captured so easily

[]: Re: Crucified Lilith             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat Sep 21, 2019 8:17 pm The best I can come up with is that, one some level, she WANTED it to happen.

[]: Re: Crucified Lilith             Quote Post by Lavinius » Thu Sep 26, 2019 10:27 pm The Cross itself (not the nails) is clearly non-Lilin technology (the head piece is hovering ). I think it's an error to assume that the Cross is actually a restraining device- it doesn't keep her from regrowing, the Lance does that. Rather, I think the Cross is probably a medical device of some kind. Since Lilith doesn't have the Fruit of Life, she can't have lived for four billion years as she has because of that inbuilt immortality. Since she has the Fruit of Knowledge/Science, it makes sense that she'd use some sort of machine she made. And the Cross seems like the best candidate.

I think it's an error to assume that the Cross is actually a restraining device- it doesn't keep her from regrowing, the Lance does that. Rather, I think the Cross is probably a medical device of some kind. Since Lilith doesn't have the Fruit of Life, she can't have lived for four billion years as she has because of that inbuilt immortality. Since she has the Fruit of Knowledge/Science, it makes sense that she'd use some sort of machine she made. And the Cross seems like the best candidate.
